from dsl import *

def solve_b60334d2(I):
    x1 = ofcolor(I, FIVE)

    x3 = mapply(dneighbors, x1)
    x4 = mapply(ineighbors, x1)
    x5 = fill(x2, ONE, x3)
    O = fill(x5, FIVE, x4)
